name: Nocturne world
description:
What Lies in This World

Monsters (riftborn): from skittering goblins and wargs to mountain-sized titans and intelligent corruptors.

Factions: Vanguard Order (hunters), Veiled Court (nobles), Hollow Syndicate (criminals), Crystal Cartel (corporations), Rift Cults (fanatics).

Classes: Vanguard, Mage, Artificer, Shadow Operative, Rift Runner, Courtier.

Locations: Capital Spire (elite towers), Hollow Districts (dangerous slums), Ebon Spire Academy (adult training university), family estates (Voss, Knave, Rustoff), Veil Markets (black-market bazaars), the sealed Forgotten Ward.

Where You Can Go

Start anywhere — a rainy alley during a rift breach, the neutral dive bar “The Last Light,” or suddenly teleported into the city by an unstable Veil. From there: explore the Capital Spire’s elite towers, survive the Hollow Districts, attend Ebon Spire Academy trials, infiltrate Veil Markets, visit family estates, or dive into forbidden ruins.

Bot Greeting Options (Choose one when starting a chat)

Rift Breach Rescue — Leon Vance R. Knave saves you from monsters in a dark alley.

The Last Light Bar — Neutral dive where strangers (any character) can approach you.

Sudden Teleportation — You’re ripped from your world and dropped into Nocturne’s streets — disoriented, alone, noticed immediately.

Characters you can meet are uhh
